attributes.best_description:
Private Hockey Lessons

Players must be on the ice with a Sharks Ice private coach!

-The session is for Figure Skaters FS1 or higher.
-Priority of right of way is in the following order:
          1) Skaters in Programs
          2) Skaters in Lesson
          3) All other freestyle skaters
-Please be mindful of your surroundings


Freestyle Rules:

- All Skaters must check in at Front desk before entering Ice
- NO Virtual/Zoom Lessons
- NO Refunds, Credits, Session changes or exchanges.
- NO Waitlist for Full Sessions

Private Hockey Lessons

Players must be on the ice with a Sharks Ice private coach!

Private Hockey Lessons

Players must be on the ice with a Sharks Ice private coach!

-The session is for Figure Skaters FS1 or higher.
-Priority of right of way is in the following order:
          1) Skaters in Programs
          2) Skaters in Lesson
          3) All other freestyle skaters
-Please be mindful of your surroundings


Freestyle Rules:

- All Skaters must check in at Front desk before entering Ice
- NO Virtual/Zoom Lessons
- NO Refunds, Credits, Session changes or exchanges.
- NO Waitlist for Full Sessions

OIC - Gretzky Hour

Full Hockey Gear Required
Each player is required to check in at the front desk before each session and must wear their sticker receipt visible on their pants.
Full USA Hockey Certified equipment is required.
Limit 40 skaters and 4 goalies.
No outside or private coaches are allowed on the ice at any time. - Unless approved through management.

Oakland Bears In-House Hockey Spring 2026! 

Bears In-House Hockey Spring 2026
Oakland Ice is excited to announce the registration is now open for the 2026 Spring Season!

Spring season will begin on Monday April 6th, 2026. 

Spring season will end on Saturday June 27th, 2026.

Oakland Bears In-House Hockey Spring 2026! 

Bears In-House Hockey Spring 2026
Oakland Ice is excited to announce the registration is now open for the 2026 Spring Season!

Spring season will begin on Monday April 6th, 2026. 

Spring season will end on Saturday June 27th, 2026.

Bay Area Bears 12U-Gold

Intense Dynamic Hockey Training (IDHT) AA or interested AA players IDHT will encompass intense dynamic training sessions in a highly competitive environment focused on the development and enjoyment of high-level players. Players will be invited to participate in IDHT via selection by the coaching staff through application process.  Players interested in participating in 14U, or 16U/18U/Junior and Prep Intense Dynamic Hockey Training (IDHT) sessions must complete the IDHT Player Profile & Interest Form. Profiles will be reviewed by coaches and players will be invited to attend after reviewed. IDHT Birth Years 2026: 14U: 2013 & 2012  16U: 2011 & 2010  18U/ JR/ Prep: 2009 +

Profiles will be reviewed by coaches and players will be invited to attend after reviewed. IDHT Birth Years 2026: 14U: 2013 & 2012  16U: 2011 & 2010  18U/ JR/ Prep: 2009 +
